name: 300 MG Pregabalin Capsules IP
about: 300 MG Pregabalin Capsules IP are general medicines used to treat pain caused by nerve damage due to diabetes, shingles, and spinal cord injury. These capsules work by reducing the pain signals sent by damaged nerves to the brain. The recommended dosage of the medicine should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. The capsules come in a physical form of hard-shell capsules and are packaged in 3x10 capsules per box. These capsules should be stored in a cool place and should not be exposed to direct sunlight or heat. The medicine is manufactured in India and is available for export, supply, or trade.

faq.a: The capsules should be stored in a cool place and should not be exposed to direct sunlight or heat.
